title: Nani's Bushed Bushes
description: Makes foliage bushier as they should be.
body:
![Project Title](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1042394/description_46fd8f9e-a296-4ec8-81d2-58baad675657.png) ***   ### **\[Description:\]** Nani's Bushed Bushes is a simple resource pack designed to make every plant look bushier and more natural. This pack is still a Work in Progress (WIP)! Any Feedback or Comment will be considerated and appreciated!   ### **\[Installation Guide:\]** 1 – Download the latest version of this pack. 2 – Put the  file _`.zip`_ inside your _`resourcepacks`_ folder.       Not sure where it is? Press _`Win+R`_, type _`%AppData%/.minecraft`_, and hit enter. 3 – Done, enjoy!   ### **\[Credits:\]** Banani – Textures, Models and Author  

**\[Check out my other projects:\]**

* ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1042394/description_a6e0cb1c-9b5c-4192-a7b0-09bb9bd1c7f4.png) – [Nani's SkyBlock (Hypixel)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/nanis-skyblock-hypixel) * More coming soon! – Stay tuned!
